'''鈭歳-b-t-ng''' ('''karabtengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tidder|tidder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tidder|tidder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-b-t-ng
|-
! Lemma
| karabtengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirabtengoko|thirabtengoko]] || [[word:jirabtengoko|jirabtengoko]] || [[word:shirabtengoko|shirabtengoko]] || [[word:kirabtengoko|kirabtengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurabtengoko|thuthurabtengoko]] || [[word:jujurabtengoko|jujurabtengoko]] || [[word:shushurabtengoko|shushurabtengoko]] || [[word:kukurabtengoko|kukurabtengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
